name: aurora-fonts
title: Aurora Hosted Fonts
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Hosted Manrope, Inter, Noto Sans, and JetBrains Mono @font-face declarations for Aurora typography tokens.
docs:
Install after aurora-tokens when the consuming app should use Aurora-hosted webfonts instead of system fallbacks.

Import this stylesheet before aurora-tokens or alongside it at the app root.
